name: Healthy Pancakes for One
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all ingredients except baking soda in a bowl until well combined.
2. Stir in the baking soda and let the batter rest for 2-3 minutes.
3. Heat a griddle or non-stick pan over medium heat.
4. Spoon about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot surface to make three pancakes.
5. Cook until the edges are dry and bubbles form on the surface, approximately 3-5 minutes.
6. Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 3 minutes on the other side.
7. Serve with sugar-free pancake syrup.
Variations:
- Add 1/4 cup sugar-free applesauce and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon when mixing in the baking soda.
- After adding the baking soda, stir in 1/2 cup blueberries until evenly distributed.
- Mix in 1 small banana that has been sliced and 2 tablespoons cocoa powder.
